c.d: The app's ability to play playlists in a randomized order.
The total number of songs available in the app's catalog.
The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's design.
The app's ability to download songs for offline listening.
The maximum audio quality offered by the app (e.g., standard, high-definition, lossless).
The range of devices and operating systems the app supports (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, macOS).
The monthly fee required to access premium features of the app.
The app's ability to suggest songs and playlists based on user preferences.
The app's features that allow sharing and discovering music with friends.
Availability of exclusive songs, albums, or artist collaborations not found on other platforms.
